page.title: Finance
page.subtitle: Cash, what the estate is owed, and the runway from both ledgers.

empty.title: Nothing on the books yet
empty.description: When you issue an invoice it lands here with its inventory commitment, payment timeline and realized margin.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: Every AR document, newest first. Each one is a real commitment of green inventory.

empty.title: No invoices yet
empty.description: When you issue a proforma or commercial invoice it lands here, with its inventory commitment and payment timeline.

margin.title: Realized margin
margin.subtitle: Revenue against true cost-per-kg-green, per lot on this doc.

pay.title: Record a payment
pay.description: This is a money-shaped action. Confirm the amount and method before it posts.

void.title: Void this invoice
void.description: This reverses the revenue with a correcting row. It does not delete anything, and a doc with payments cannot be voided. Issue a credit note instead.

runway.title: Cash runway
runway.subtitle: The only place both ledgers net, plus the pre-harvest financing gap.

waterfall.title: AR due against committed cost
waterfall.sub: A positive net means receivables cover booked cost.

preharvest.title: Before the picking crew shows up
preharvest.sub: Pre-sold volume against the open por-obra labour liability, so the financing gap is visible early.

sync.title: Accounting sync
sync.subtitle: QuickBooks, Xero and the Panama DGI PAC bridge. We map our coffee-native ledger onto the buyer's books, we never rebuild them.

health.empty: Nothing queued. Issue an invoice to start a sync.

map.title: Account map
map.subtitle: How each ledger key posts to the buyer's chart of accounts.

errors.generic: Could not save that. Check the numbers and try again.
errors.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
errors.kgPositive: Kilograms must be greater than zero.
errors.exportGate: A commercial invoice needs a contract reference and an Incoterm.
errors.reasonRequired: Add a reason for the void.
errors.matchKeyRequired: Set the ledger key to map.
